question_text: Let {𝑎௡}௡ୀଵ ஶ be a sequence of positive real numbers satisfying 𝑎௡ାଵ = 7 + 𝑎௡ 343 , 𝑛≥1 with 𝑎ଵ= 3 and 𝑎௡< 7 for all 𝑛≥2.

options.C: onsider the following statements: (I) {𝑎௡} is monotonically increasing. (II) {𝑎௡} converges to a value in the interval [3, 7]. Then which of the above statements is/are true?
